store_headline: WordPress Theme for Music Festivals and Concert Venues
store_subheadline: Display your full lineup, sell tickets, and build countdown pages — all without a developer.
features: Advanced event management system with calendar
Artist profiles linked to events via custom taxonomies
Built with Elementor page builder for easy customization
Wolf Core plugin with music & event specific widgets
Festival lineup display with sorting options
Event countdown timers and schedule displays
One-click demo import with complete content
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
selling_points: The only WordPress theme built for music festivals and concert venues, not an events theme repurposed
Festival countdown timer drives urgency the moment a visitor lands — built into the layout, not a plugin
Full-screen DJ stage hero photography communicates live event atmosphere before a visitor reads a word
Lineup display links artist profiles to event dates — promoters get a working site, not a mockup
Ticket sales via WooCommerce built in — no third-party ticketing plugin required
Elementor-powered so lineup announcements and schedule updates go live in minutes
Wolf Artists gives each headliner a proper profile page linked to the event
key_benefits: Build a festival site with lineup, countdown, and ticket sales combined
Sell tickets directly from your site and keep revenue from ticketing fees
Launch a venue site with a dedicated lineup, not generic events pages
Convert casual interest into tickets with countdown timers that signal scarcity
Link artist profiles to event dates so fans and press see everything
Update lineups, schedules, and announcements without a developer

testimonials.text: Poize is hands down one of the best WordpPress themes I’ve ever worked with to date! The design is fantastic, the layout is intuitive, and it comes packed with a variety of great features. Especially the custom Events plugin by Wolf Theme that I love. The theme integrates seamlessly with Elementor, making customization an absolute breeze. What truly makes this theme stand out is the exceptional support provided by Wolf Themes. Their team is quick to respond, incredibly helpful, and provide detailed solutions to any questions you throw at them. Wolf Themes has truly knocked it out of the park with Poize. It’s the perfect theme for anyone working on musicians, music events, festivals, or event websites. Thank you so much Wolf Themes team for creating such an exceptional theme! Keep up the great work!
testimonials.author: GINGALLEY
